title: Placeable Plants
description: Allows you to place plants on almost any block!
body:
##
⚠ This Data Pack will **NOT** be updated beyond 1.21.4, as it is being replaced by the mod version, which you can check out here!
# Placeable > Allows you to place plants on almost any block! # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Datapack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Placeable) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Placeable) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command ### ⚠️ Mod version is available starting from Minecraft 1.21 and up
# 📖Features - This Data Pack allows you to place plants on any flat surface. To do that, just rename a plant to Placeable and by dropping it on a flat surface, it will place. - Made the Dead Bush renewable through smelting and camp fire cooking. - Added recipes for Tall Grass and Large Fern.                    
YouTube Showcase
# 🌱Compatible Plants
1.20+ - Grass - Tall Grass - Fern - Large Fern - Dead Bush - Sweet Berries - Nether Sprouts - Crimson Roots - Warped Roots - All Flowers - Torchflower **(new)** - Pitcher Plant **(new)** - ~~Pink Petals **_(coming soon)_**~~
1.18 - 1.19 - Grass - Tall Grass - Fern - Large Fern - Dead Bush - Sweet Berries - Nether Sprouts - Crimson Roots - Warped Roots - All Flowers
# 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack simply remove it from the "_datapacks_" folder.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** simply remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
## 🔗External links ## 📣Credits Bisumto the original creator of this feature.
